source: Coverage-sprint verification tasks (docs/05-data-rules.md table-onboarding rule: 2-3 frozen-key benchmark-style tasks per newly onboarded table). Task ids CC* to keep the Phase-0 benchmark (B1-B20, benchmark/answer-key.json) and its 14/14 + 6/6 gate counts untouched. Scored hermetically by tests/query/coverage-key.test.ts over the committed fixtures; the honesty rule from answer-key.json applies unchanged: keys are never edited to green.

pinnedTo.note: Values independently verified on 2026-07-17 by re-querying BOTH live CBS platforms before freezing: OData v4 (datasets.cbs.nl .../Observations) and OData v3 (opendata.cbs.nl .../TypedDataSet) returned identical values for every cell below. The committed fixture captures (captured the same day) are the replay source the tests run against. Table #3 (85770NED): frozen in the session-49 overnight prep with EXPLICIT targets; RE-POINTED to canonical keys in the session-50 vocab batch (frozen values unchanged). Table #2 (85880NED, session 50): FULL ingest (owner decision — the lean 2-flavor slice was refuted by the hermetic validator: 26 of 210 measures exist only under other SoortMutaties flavors); CC5-CC7 frozen after build-day re-measurement on both platforms (v4=v3 exact: 1.4 / -1.1 / 0.2). Tables #4-#9 (85828NED, 85937NED, 85429NED, 85792NED, 80590ned, 83625NED — session-53 prep, 2026-07-17): CC11-CC31 frozen with EXPLICIT targets, the same #164 batch discipline as table #3's prep. Every cell re-measured live on both platforms AND verified against the committed fixture bytes before freezing. RE-POINTED to canonical keys in the session-54 vocab batch (2026-07-18, frozen values unchanged); CC13/CC15/CC23/CC24/CC26 deliberately stay explicit — they pin alternates (index level, non-default category, city/province on the plain-dimension table, unadjusted twin), not canonical keys.

83693NED.title: Consumentenvertrouwen, economisch klimaat en koopbereidheid; gecorrigeerd

85880NED.title: Bbp, productie en bestedingen; kwartalen, mutaties, nationale rekeningen

85828NED.title: Handel en diensten; omzet- en productieontwikkeling, index 2021=100

85937NED.title: Consumptieve bestedingen door huishoudens; nationale rekeningen, 2021=100

CC1.question: Wat is het consumentenvertrouwen in juni 2026?

CC2.question: Wat was het consumentenvertrouwen in februari 2013?
CC2.note: Historical-depth check deep in the 1986-2026 series (the pre-2022 record low), so a truncated or shifted ingest cannot pass on recent rows alone.

CC3.question: Wat is de koopbereidheid in juni 2026?

CC4.question: Wat was het consumentenvertrouwen in 2025 (jaarcijfer)?
CC4.note: 83693NED publishes ONLY a monthly grain (all 483 period keys are YYYYMMnn, measured v3+v4 2026-07-17). A year-figure ask must refuse value-free (principle c / R11), never average months into a fabricated year number.

CC5.question: Hoe hard groeide de Nederlandse economie in het eerste kwartaal van 2026?
CC5.note: Headline GDP flash: volume growth vs the same quarter a year earlier (canonical default for 'economische groei'). Re-measured on both platforms on build day 2026-07-17. Flash figures are Voorlopig — R11.

CC6.question: Hoeveel kromp de economie in het vierde kwartaal van 2023?
CC6.note: Historical negative-growth check deep in the series (Definitief).

CC7.question: Wat was de groei ten opzichte van het vorige kwartaal in het eerste kwartaal van 2026?
CC7.note: Second SoortMutaties flavor (quarter-on-quarter, own canonical key gdp_growth_qoq_volume) — pins that the full ingest really carries multiple flavors and the keys pin them by dims.

CC8.question: Wat was de jaarmutatie van de producentenprijzen (afzet totaal) in mei 2026?
CC8.note: Headline PPI YoY, total sales area x total ProdCom (A052584, the hierarchy root). Last 5 months Voorlopig — R11.

CC9.question: Wat was de jaarmutatie van de producentenprijzen in juni 2023?
CC9.note: Historical negative-mutation check deep in the series.

CC10.question: Wat was de jaarmutatie van de invoerprijzen in mei 2026?
CC10.note: Second Afzetgebieden flavor (invoer) — pins that the slice really carries both sales areas.

CC11.question: Hoeveel steeg de omzet van de detailhandel in mei 2026 ten opzichte van een jaar eerder?
CC11.measureTitle: Waarde / Ontwikkeling t.o.v. jaar eerder / Ongecorrigeerd
CC11.note: Headline retail turnover YoY (branch 371600 = SBI 47 Detailhandel niet in auto's). 2026 periods are Voorlopig — R11.

CC12.question: Wat deed de omzet van supermarkten en warenhuizen in mei 2026?
CC12.measureTitle: Waarde / Ontwikkeling t.o.v. jaar eerder / Ongecorrigeerd
CC12.note: Second sliced branch (371700 = SBI 471 supermarkten en warenhuizen) — pins that the 8-branch slice really carries the subgroups, and a negative value survives the pipeline.

CC13.question: Wat was het omzetindexcijfer van de detailhandel voor 2025?
CC13.note: Index-level measure + JJ grain (Definitief) — pins that mixed grains and the index family co-exist next to the mutation family. Unit string carries CBS's own spaces ('2021 = 100'), verbatim.

CC14.question: Met hoeveel groeide de consumptie van huishoudens in december 2025?
CC14.note: Headline household consumption (koopdaggecorrigeerde volumemutatie, binnenlandse consumptie A047812). Voorlopig — the table's Status field marks 2021+ Voorlopig, broader than CBS's own prose claims (measured 2026-07-17).

CC15.question: Hoeveel gaven huishoudens meer uit aan voedingsmiddelen in het vierde kwartaal van 2025?
CC15.note: KW grain + a second category (A047825, one of the 6 of 14 categories that carry the koopdaggecorrigeerd measure — docs/11 documents the 6/14 sparsity).

CC16.question: Met hoeveel groeide de consumptie van huishoudens in mei 2026?
CC16.note: Freshest month at capture — a truncated-at-the-end ingest cannot pass.

CC17.question: Hoe hard kromp de consumptie van huishoudens in april 2020?
CC17.note: Covid-depth check at the fixture's 2020 floor (Definitief, strongly negative) — a shifted or floor-broken ingest cannot pass on recent rows alone.

CC18.question: Hoeveel bedroeg de invoerwaarde van goederen in april 2026?
CC18.note: Headline goods-import value, totals slice (Landen T001047 x SITC T001082). Freshest month at capture.

CC19.question: Met hoeveel steeg de invoerwaarde van goederen in april 2026 vergeleken met een jaar eerder?
CC19.note: The CBS-published YoY mutation measure — pins that we serve CBS's own jaarmutatie, never a self-computed one (R5).

CC20.question: Wat was de invoerwaarde van goederen in januari 2015?
CC20.note: Series-start depth check (2015MM01 is the earliest period; this table's fixture has NO capture floor).

CC21.question: Met hoeveel veranderde de uitvoerwaarde in 2021 ten opzichte van 2020?
CC21.note: Methodebreuk 2020/2021: CBS deliberately publishes NO jaarmutatie rows for any 2021 period (nor 2015, the series start) — absent rows, measured exhaustively 2026-07-17. The period itself IS published (levels exist), so the honest refusal is the loud no_data gap, value-free — never a self-computed change across the break (principle c / R5).

CC22.question: Wat was de prijsindex van bestaande koopwoningen in het eerste kwartaal van 2026?
CC22.note: Headline regional house-price index, national aggregate (RegioS is a PLAIN dimension in this table, not GeoDimension — the region travels through dims). All periods are 'direct definitief'.

CC23.question: Wat was de gemiddelde verkoopprijs van een woning in Amsterdam in het vierde kwartaal van 2025?
CC23.note: City-level cell (Amsterdam, one of the 4 gemeenten in this 21-region table) — pins that the sub-national codes really carry data.

CC24.question: Hoeveel woningen werden er in 2020 in Zuid-Holland verkocht?
CC24.note: Province + JJ grain + the sales-count measure family, at the fixture's 2020 floor.

CC25.question: Wat was de seizoengecorrigeerde werkloosheid in juni 2026?
CC25.note: Headline monthly unemployment (lowercase v4 id 80590ned — docs/07 quirk #1; totals slice Geslacht T001038 x Leeftijd 52052). Freshest month at capture; all periods Definitief.

CC26.question: Wat was het werkloosheidspercentage (niet gecorrigeerd) over 2025?
CC26.note: The UNadjusted twin measure carries real JJ values (year averages) — the asymmetry CC28 pins from the other side.

CC27.question: Hoe hoog was de seizoengecorrigeerde werkloosheid in februari 2014?
CC27.note: Historical-depth check (the post-crisis high region; this table's fixture has NO capture floor, series starts 2003).

CC28.question: Wat was de seizoengecorrigeerde werkloosheid over heel 2025?
CC28.note: Seasonally-adjusted measures exist on JJ periods as rows with a NULL value and CBS reason 'Impossible' (seasonal adjustment does not exist on year basis — measured 2026-07-17). The honest behavior is serving the null WITH its reason (R11), never substituting the unadjusted figure or averaging months.

CC29.question: Wat was de gemiddelde verkoopprijs van een koopwoning in Nederland in 2025?
CC29.note: National aggregate via the REAL GeoDimension (unlike 85792NED) — the region travels through the intent's regions field, the 03759ned way.

CC30.question: Wat was de gemiddelde verkoopprijs van een koopwoning in Amsterdam in 2025?
CC30.note: Gemeente-level cell — the per-gemeente local-angle engine (#160(b)); 728 GM codes in this table.

CC31.question: Wat kostte een koopwoning in Amsterdam gemiddeld in 2015?
CC31.note: Depth check at the fixture's 2015 floor (the live table runs back to 1995).
